log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Half-Orc — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Half-Orc — Bardic Musician (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Half-Orc — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Half-Orc — Bardic Musician. 7d8+30 necrotic.

→ Half-Orc — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 15 necrotic damage (half).
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Half-Orc — Bardic Musician --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 14

--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
